item.title: Offline Utility for Form 145 and Form 146 has been enabled on the e-Filing Portal. Users can download, fill, and submit the forms directly through the utility available under “Downloads → Income tax Forms → Income tax Act, 2025”.
item.description: Offline Utility for Form 145 and Form 146 has been enabled on the e-Filing Portal. Users can download, fill, and submit the forms directly through the utility available under “Downloads → Income tax Forms → Income tax Act, 2025”.

item.title: CBDT has notified ITR-2 form for AY 2026-27.Click here to download.
item.description: CBDT has notified ITR-2 form for AY 2026-27.Click here to download.

item.title: CBDT has notified ITR-3 form for AY 2026-27.Click here to download.
item.description: CBDT has notified ITR-3 form for AY 2026-27.Click here to download.

item.title: CBDT has notified ITR-7 form for AY 2026-27.Click here to download.
item.description: CBDT has notified ITR-7 form for AY 2026-27.Click here to download.

item.title: Notification giving effect to the Amending Protocol to the India–Brazil Double Taxation Avoidance Agreement (DTAA) under section 90(1) of the Income‑tax Act, 1961. Click here to download.
item.description: Notification giving effect to the Amending Protocol to the India–Brazil Double Taxation Avoidance Agreement (DTAA) under section 90(1) of the Income‑tax Act, 1961. Click here to download.

item.title: CBDT has notified ITR-U form for AY 2026-27.Click here to download.
item.description: CBDT has notified ITR-U form for AY 2026-27.Click here to download.

item.title: Directorate of Income-tax (Systems), New Delhi notified the Procedure, format and standards for generation and allotment of Unique Identification Number (UIN) in respect of Form No. 121 and quarterly furnishing of Part B thereof by the payer.Click here to download.
item.description: Directorate of Income-tax (Systems), New Delhi notified the Procedure, format and standards for generation and allotment of Unique Identification Number (UIN) in respect of Form No. 121 and quarterly furnishing of Part B thereof by the payer.Click here to download.
